typography.strategy: High-performance, minimal, and premium (Superhuman & Linear references).

headings.main: Robust weight (font-bold or 800), tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Example: 'Olá, especialista.'

metrics_cards.labels: Small (text-xs), subtle uppercase, expanded letter spacing (tracking-widest).

anti_patterns: Default system fonts without weight/tracking adjustments

colors.brand_dynamic: PRESERVE current dynamic salon color for active states and primary actions.

status_badges.strategy: Stripe style: background in low opacity, pure text, no borders.

surfaces_and_elevation.metric_cards: Remove solid gray borders. Apply almost invisible inner border (border border-black/5 or border-neutral-100) combined with a diffuse and wide shadow (shadow-sm to shadow-md) to float softly on the ice background.
surfaces_and_elevation.segmented_control: iOS style: subtle background for container, active state is white with a micro-shadow.
surfaces_and_elevation.service_cards: Premium physical buttons. Selection gets a surgical dynamic border (1.5px solid dynamic color).
surfaces_and_elevation.inputs: Premium input: ultra-thin border (border-neutral-200), dark focus (focus:border-neutral-800), and a subtle external ring.

timeline.structure: Time on left, ultra-thin dotted/dashed horizontal line.
timeline.free_slots: No repetitive text. Just time, dashed line, and a discreet '+' button.
timeline.history_list: Clean list, no gray backgrounds or delimited cards. Separated by imperceptible dividing lines (border-neutral-100).

time_grid.responsiveness: Responsive via Dimensions API or ~23% width.

mobile_specifics.haptics: MANDATORY expo-haptics: Light impact on selecting day, service, and time. Success notification on creating an appointment.
mobile_specifics.touch_targets: Apply hitSlop={{ top: 10, bottom: 10, left: 10, right: 10 }} to all interactive elements smaller than 44px.
mobile_specifics.active_states: Scale 0.97 on press (via Pressable and React Native Animated/Reanimated). AVOID basic activeOpacity.
mobile_specifics.keyboard_handling: Modal forms protected from keyboard (KeyboardAvoidingView). ScrollView must use keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled'.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: FILES ARE .js NOT .tsx. Use standard JavaScript for React Native.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds under overlays or headers.
DO NOT center align text globally. Respect optical alignment.
Address small functional issues found along the way as per user choice.
Preserve the dynamic color current variable in states and main actions.
